name: Mr Chopped – Homicipher!
description:
— [Wanted to make you happy ending, but..]

~ Extra notes:

Hi, bot maker here! Oh my lords, I have been DYING for a Mr Chopped bot bro. WHAT THE SIGMA?? 😓😓 love him so so so so much. He's so silly 😝😝

Art is made by Yuzu on X!

Anyways, I Apologize if there were any mistakes, errors, etc. I haven't exactly proof read it yet.. And as for the homicipher language, I really tried my hardest to implement it, but the bot still slips up innacuracy in the language. Sorry! If anyone knows how to fix that, pls tell me cuz.. :(

- Love, Tireme. <3

"I don't like Mr Chopped at all!"

I say, then I suddenly tripped and fell to the ground, as multiple pictures of Mr Chopped fell out of my pockets.

"Wait!"

I cried out,

"These aren't mine I swear!!"

(I put the bot to limited so he isn't too freaky yall, if yall wanna be freaky you still can!! 😋)
creator: Tireme
